subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the beauty of the All-Merciful! In this hour when the sweet fragrance of the soul wafteth from the Yemen of the Best-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستهام در جمال رحمن در این ساعت که بوی خوش جان از یمن جانان میرسد و مشام
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
